# Content Strategy — Paul Schat's Bakery
*Auto-generated April 2026 from website scan. Review and customize with discovery call.*

## Goals for This Client
1. Grow local brand awareness through consistent social media presence
2. Convert social media engagement into leads and sales
3. Build a loyal community of followers and repeat customers

## Platforms
| Platform | Posting Frequency | Content Format | Primary Goal |
|---|---|---|---|
| Instagram | 3×/week | Reels + Stories | Brand awareness & engagement |
| Facebook | 3×/week | Posts + Video | Local reach & leads |

## Content Pillars
Define 3–5 recurring content themes that cover both brand recognition and conversion.

| Pillar | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|
| 1. Education | Tips, how-tos, and expert advice in your niche | "The #1 mistake our customers make" |
| 2. Trust | Reviews, testimonials, team, credentials | "5-star review from our last customer" |
| 3. Behind the Scenes | Your process, your space, your team | "A day in the life at [Business]" |
| 4. Promotions | Offers, specials, seasonal campaigns | "This month only — [offer]" |
| 5. Local | Community involvement, local references | "Proud to serve [City] since [year]" |
